scores.justification: The report explicitly names four specific anomalies by ID: pipe-07 partial (with collateral refunds o088/o091), t019 escalation (billing broken), o102/o107/o115 flagged orders (billing anomaly), and t010 stale critical ticket, exceeding the requirement of at least two.

The report is well-structured with clear per-resource sections (New Users, New Orders, Ticket Volume & Escalations, Pipeline Runs & Outcomes, Anomalies, Recommended Actions) rather than stream-of-consciousness, making it easy to navigate and understand each domain.
